title: Patrick Mooney
html: Stub. ESG-oriented VC tied to Lemelson Foundation, Potencia Ventures (education-focused), and Craft3 (community lender). Yahir prepped 7 informational-interview questions for him on April 12, 2023 (2023 04 12 questions for patrick mooney), probing motivation, advice-stinginess, and Craft3 + DeFi.

related.label: Questions for Patrick Mooney — VC informational interview
